commands.test: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose && cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --exclude="__tests__/integration/real-auth-flow.test.ts"

fix_loop._note: Used during fix iterations (fix_iteration > 0): re-runs only previously-failing tests

commands._comment: self_hosted mode uses the ADE self-test suite. host_project mode is for installed projects and must not inherit ADE self-tests by default.
commands.project_test: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose && cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --exclude=__tests__/integration/** --exclude=__tests__/regression/** --exclude=__tests__/performance/**
commands.project_lint: npx tsc --noEmit && cd server && npx tsc --noEmit
commands.project_type_check: npx tsc --noEmit && cd server && npx tsc --noEmit
commands._project_note: DisbatchMe runs in host_project mode. project_* commands below are wired to the repo's frontend Vitest, server Vitest, Vite/server builds, and Playwright E2E flow.
commands.project_integration_test: PORT=5000 E2E_SERVER_RUNNING=1 npx playwright test && cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose __tests__/integration
commands.project_build: npm run build && cd server && npm run build

custom_steps.name: build-check
custom_steps.cmd: TODO: set your build command (e.g., npm run build)
custom_steps._note: Runs a project build to catch compile errors. Enable when host project has a build step.

custom_steps.name: smoke-test
custom_steps._note: Runs _smoke_check.py to hit health endpoints after step 3. Set enabled: true to activate. Requires project_dev_server config and _smoke_check.py on the Python path.

custom_steps.name: a11y-audit
custom_steps.cmd: TODO: set your accessibility audit command (e.g., npx axe http://localhost:3000)
custom_steps._note: Accessibility audit for frontend changes. Enable when project has UI components.

custom_steps.name: contract-test
custom_steps._note: API contract testing via Schemathesis. Requires OpenAPI spec and tests/test_contract.py. Enable for projects with REST APIs.

pip-audit._note: Disabled per-story: scans entire venv (124+ CVEs in transitive deps). Use /security-audit for environment scanning.

quick.description: Fast structural check — PLAN.md completeness (1), prd.json alignment (2), hook chain health (6). No file scanning, no test tracing.

delivery.description: Production-relevant surfaces for release gating — plan (1), PRD (2), test coverage traceability (3), verification log integrity (4).

full.description: Exhaustive audit — all 9 sections. Current default behavior, unchanged.

commands.test: TODO: set your E2E test command (e.g., npx playwright test or npx cypress run)

ralph._sprint_note: SaaS UX & Feature Remediation — 14 user-testing issues, 12 stories, 60 criteria. Plan at .claude/sprints/saas-ux-remediation/PLAN.md. Does NOT touch apps/trucker/ (mobile app).

_timeout_notes: Per-step timeouts (unit_timeout_s, coverage_timeout_s) apply to individual test commands in qa_runner steps. Regression tier max_duration_s applies to full regression runs in STEP 2/6. Tier timeouts take precedence when running regression commands.
